This '''Quarren Commander''' commanded the [[Quarren Isolation League/Legends|Quarren Isolation League]] forces against [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto's]] [[Clone SCUBA trooper/Legends|clone SCUBA trooper]] forces during the [[Battle of Mon Calamari (Clone Wars)/Legends|Battle of Mon Calamari]] in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

He engaged [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]] in combat, and although he was a very skilled combatant evidenced by his killing of numerous clone SCUBA troopers single handedly armed with only his [[Trident/Legends|trident]], he ultimately failed and was pushed down a volcanic crater.
